title: Stereoisomerism in transition element complexes
summary: 9701 A Level — cis/trans and optical isomerism in octahedral and square planar complexes.
learningObjectives: Identify cis and trans isomers in octahedral complexes.
Describe optical isomerism with bidentate ligands.

simpleExplanation.title: Isomerism in complexes
simpleExplanation.summary: Cis and trans isomers differ in ligand positions. Bidentate ligands like en can give optical Δ and Λ isomers.
steps: Square planar Pt(II) complexes can be cis/trans.
No plane of symmetry → optical activity.

sections.content: **Complex stereoisomerism** (28.4) is tested with **diagrams**. Draw **3D octahedral** with wedges for cis/trans.
